IN DEPT. 212 FOR A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE UNTIL THE CASE IS ONCE AGAIN AT ISSUE. THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 6/5/09 IN DEPT. 220 IS VACATED. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING.
